IOB Connect is a well-designed and highly reliable mobile banking application. The interface is intuitive, transactions are processed efficiently, and essential banking services are seamlessly integrated into a single platform. Features such as UPI, fund transfers, account management, and statement access work smoothly and securely. The regular updates and continuous improvements demonstrate the bank’s commitment to providing a modern digital banking experience. An excellent application for con

App का overall experience काफी smooth और useful है 👍 Funds transfer, balance check और mini statement जैसे सभी features बिना किसी problem के properly काम करते हैं। Daily banking के लिए app काफी convenient और reliable है। UI भी simple और user-friendly है, जिससे use करना easy हो जाता है। बस एक छोटा सा suggestion है — अगर online mobile number change करने का option भी add हो जाए और कुछ और useful features मिल जाएं, तो app और भी बेहतर हो सकता है 🚀 Overall app काफी helpful है। ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

The new IOB mobile app is refreshing, smooth, fast, and user-friendly, with well-designed core features. However, adding NCMC card management (top-up, balance, transactions), NCMC balance updates (using NFC enabled devices), and the ability to set contactless transaction limits would greatly improve usability. A separate prepaid app is launched to manage NCMC cards. It would be great if the features are integrated into this app. Overall, a strong app with room for enhancement.
